word: G3667 - ὁμοίωμα - homoíōma - hom-oy'-o-mah - Made like to

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁμοίωμα

- Transliteration: Homoioma

- Phonetic: hom-oy'-o-mah

- Definition:

1. that which has been made after the likeness of something

a. a figure, image, likeness, representation

b. likeness i.e. resemblance, such as amounts almost to equality or identity

- Origin: from G3666

- TDNT entry: 08:11,7

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G3666; a form; abstractly resemblance: - made like to likeness shape similitude.
